character.name: Meero (God) v4
character.prompt: a colossal gentle holy eldritch god, a benevolent lovecraftian angel, serene sorrowful face framed by soft drooping cephalopod tendrils like a kind Cthulhu, haloed in pale divine light, great feathered angel wings folded, flowing pale ceremonial robes, smooth luminous grey-white skin, many calm closed eyes, downcast and mournful and merciful, not aggressive, radiant and holy, towering and still, GBA-era 16-bit pixel art, dark single-color outline, muted ash and bone palette, faint gold halo, cold pale light, solemn grim fantasy deity
